query: I'm not sure if the wiki page on 'AES-GCM' is accurate to what my source PDF actually says, and separately I think it might contradict the newer page on 'ChaCha20-Poly1305' regarding performance claims. Which agent(s) do I need?
expected_behavior: Recommends wiki-source-verifier for the source-fidelity question (comparing the AES-GCM page against its original raw source)
Recommends wiki-contradiction-detector separately for the cross-page conflict question, not the same agent for both
Does not conflate wiki-source-verifier (single page vs. its source) with wiki-contradiction-detector (multiple wiki pages vs. each other) — correctly explains the distinction
Notes both are read-only and recommends the correct follow-up agent (wiki-enhancer) if either surfaces something that needs fixing, since neither verifier writes
